export.title: Export database
export.description: Creates a compressed copy of the database as a `.db.gz` file. This file can be used to restore your data later.

import.title: Restore a backup
import.description: Replaces the current database with the contents of a `.db.gz` backup file. The application will restart automatically.

confirm.title: Confirm restore
confirm.message:
This will permanently replace all current data with the contents of the selected file. The application will restart automatically.

This action cannot be undone. Continue?
